data.title: Retarget 4 test files from project-setup to onboarding SKILL.md with updated assertions
data.description:
## Description

Retarget 4 test files that currently read plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md to read plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md instead. The 5th file (test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh) already points to onboarding — no change needed.

### Files to modify
- tests/skills/test-project-setup-commands-format.sh — change SKILL_MD path; rewrite assertions to match onboarding structure (onboarding uses Phase-based layout, has 0 AskUserQuestion refs, 0 detection-aware labels; config key assertions like version.file_path, commands.test, jira.project already pass)
- tests/skills/test-project-setup-dependencies.sh — change SKILL_MD path; rewrite assertions for onboarding's dependency handling (no per-dep AskUserQuestion prompts, 0 PyYAML mentions, pre-commit and acli mentioned differently)
- tests/skills/test-project-setup-dryrun-conclusion.sh — change SKILL_MD path; replace Step 4/Step 6 references with Phase-based equivalents (onboarding has no "Step 4 dryrun" or "Step 6 conclusion"; has Phase 3 config generation and Phase 4 execution)
- tests/skills/test_project_setup_ci_autodetection.py — change SKILL_FILE path from project-setup to onboarding; update docstrings/comments; 7 assertion functions check for CI key names which are already present in onboarding SKILL.md (22 CI-related matches)

### Approach
1. For each bash test: change SKILL_MD path, then run the test to see which assertions fail
2. Rewrite failing assertions to verify equivalent onboarding content (not just delete them)
3. For Python test: change SKILL_FILE path, update docstrings, run to verify
4. All 5 test files (including unchanged onboarding-step.sh) must pass

### Unit test exemption justification
These files ARE tests. No source code is being modified. Any meta-test would be a change-detector test (checking that test files check the right things). Test infrastructure only.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — or at minimum, these 5 specific test files pass
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-project-setup-commands-format.sh && bash tests/skills/test-project-setup-dependencies.sh && bash tests/skills/test-project-setup-dryrun-conclusion.sh && bash tests/skills/test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh
- [ ] `poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_project_setup_ci_autodetection.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_project_setup_ci_autodetection.py -q
- [ ] No test file references project-setup/SKILL.md (only onboarding/SKILL.md)
  Verify: ! grep -r "skills/project-setup/SKILL.md" tests/skills/test-project-setup-*.sh tests/skills/test_project_setup_ci_autodetection.py
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check tests/skills/test_project_setup_ci_autodetection.py
